name: 3D modeling
description: Create basic 3D models for your projects. Perfect for beginners and basic furniture design.

description: Track and manage all your applications in one place. Keep an eye on deadlines, statuses, and important details with ease.

description: Optimize your cutting plans for materials. Save time and reduce waste by generating efficient cutting layouts for your projects.

description: Manage your family budget and expenses. Track your spending, set budgets, and gain insights into your financial habits to make informed decisions.

description: Compare JSON data structures easily. Identify differences and similarities between your JSON documents with this powerful tool.

name: Music

description: Create professional presentations quickly and easily. Design visually appealing slides and deliver engaging presentations to your audience.

description: Conduct effective sprint retrospectives to improve your team's performance and collaboration.

name: Screentime
description: Track and manage your screen time. Set limits, monitor usage, and maintain a healthy balance between digital and real-world activities.

name: Weather
description: Get real-time weather updates and forecasts for your location.
